# Contract Negotiation Playbook: Key Terms for Biosafety Equipment Procurement

## 适用受众
Sourcing_Manager

## 写作角度说明
合同条款的谈判直接影响采购价值的实现。本角度帮助采购专家识别关键合同条款，建立有效的谈判策略，保护企业利益。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Strategic contract negotiation—warranty terms, spare parts availability, service response commitments—converts procurement price savings into operational value that compounds over the equipment lifecycle.

## 参考素材
- Warranty terms: standard vs extended warranty, warranty coverage scope, claim procedures
- Spare parts availability: 10+ year commitment, pricing mechanisms, emergency procurement
- Service level agreements: response time (4h/24h/72h), on-site support, escalation procedures
- Performance guarantees: acceptance test criteria, performance bonding, liquidated damages
- Intellectual property: software licenses, customization ownership, source code escrow
- Limitation of liability: cap amounts, consequential damages exclusion, indemnity provisions
- Payment terms: milestone payments, performance holdback, currency considerations

## 关键词
Contract Negotiation, Key Terms, Warranty, Service Agreement, Performance Guarantee, Liability, Payment Terms, Negotiation Strategy
